Bt here are some important reminders to keep in mind when using Chachi. BT first, always keep a human in the loop. Review every output for accuracy and bias. Don't rely on AI alone for legal, medical, or financial decisions without expert review and use search or deep research when you need the most current information and keep privacy and security top of mind. When working with sensitive data data, you may have also heard about or even experienced a concept called a hallucination. A hallucination is a known limitation of all large language models and AI systems. A hallucination is when the AI produces something that sounds believable, but is actually incorrect. Kind of like when a friend is confidently telling a story that they believe is true, but some of the details aren't quite right. That's why it's important to keep yourself in the loop, checking and verifying what it gives you. Here's some tips to help you mitigate hallucinations. Ask for sources, citations, or for Chacha BT to show its reasoning. Clarify and break down complex questions. Provide specific details in the desired format and crosscheck with trusted sources.
